working_on.task: Use plash.png for native splash screen and in-app splash page
working_on.notes: Updated native splash yaml config and pubspec config to use assets/images/plash.png. Regenerated native splash screens for Android and iOS. Updated the Image.asset widget inside splash_page.dart to display plash.png.

recent_changes.description: Configure and regenerate splash screens to use plash.png
Disable offline mode by default and configure Supabase credentials fallback
Integrate redesigned logo, regenerate native launcher icons and native splash screens, and update app splash page UI

decisions_made.reason: User requested to turn off offline mode. Configured AppConfig to use false as default for isOffline and set development Supabase credentials as fallback.
User requested to temporarily comment out all ad-related code. A list of modified files was created at disabled_ads_files.txt.
Kept upfront cash at x100 for big deals, lowered monthly income to x20 to make game challenging. Rat Race assets are bundled into a Personal Trust Fund instead of being wiped.
